milestoneTitle: Phase M9.9 — Modal glass parity site-wide. Every chrome-y modal (lesson/quiz, storage, backup, pin-picker, snippet-recipe) now carries .glass + .glass-elevated on its frame, giving them the same warm-white translucent gradient, deeper 36px blur, and soft warm drop shadow that the YouTube and tool modals already used. The four frames had been carrying a dark-mode legacy recipe — opaque white-card gradient plus a 0.9α black drop shadow — that clashed with the light-only palette; those properties are removed so the glass recipe actually applies. Video player modal is deliberately excluded (it needs its own dark chrome around the iframe). Sub-title / eyebrow leaf-text across modals now inherits the .label-debossed impressed recipe so titles read as etched into the glass rather than flat. Recipe snippet popover on Dashboard is also in scope — phone review worth a quick glance there.
